why_it_matters: 美国核电与数据中心 PPA 最直接候选之一，用来验证 AI DC 是否推动核电资产重估
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; investor presentation; PPA/customer announcements; nuclear fleet disclosures; FERC/regulatory filings
metrics_to_verify: nuclear generation; contracted power; data center/customer PPAs; capacity factor; power prices; capex; license extensions
upgrade_signal: data center contracts or PPAs clearly improve long-term revenue visibility
downgrade_signal: no AI/data center contract evidence; power price or regulatory risk dominates

why_it_matters: merchant power + nuclear/gas exposure，适合观察 AI load 对电价和 firm power 的传导
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; investor presentation; generation mix; customer/PPA announcements
metrics_to_verify: nuclear/gas generation; hedge book; power prices; data center exposure; FCF; capital returns
upgrade_signal: AI load supports power price/contracts and cash flow durability
downgrade_signal: commodity power beta dominates; no data center linkage; regulatory/capacity market risk

why_it_matters: nuclear-adjacent data center power narrative代表，需核验合同、监管和项目可行性
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; investor presentation; data center campus/PPA disclosures; regulatory filings
metrics_to_verify: nuclear plant output; data center contract terms; interconnect; regulatory approvals; debt; FCF
upgrade_signal: contracted AI/data center load with regulatory path and visible cash flow
downgrade_signal: project blocked/delayed; contract economics weak; debt/refinancing pressure

why_it_matters: 燃气轮机和电网设备是 AI DC 更近端 firm power 约束
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; earnings release; backlog disclosures; gas power and grid segment reports
metrics_to_verify: gas turbine backlog; grid backlog; data center customer exposure; margin; lead times
upgrade_signal: data center/grid demand raises backlog and margin with long lead times
downgrade_signal: non-AI utility cycle dominates; project delays or margin pressure

why_it_matters: HALEU/核燃料是先进核能远端约束，但距离 AI DC 很远
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; DOE contracts; HALEU milestones; regulatory filings; customer contracts
metrics_to_verify: HALEU production milestones; contract backlog; DOE funding; cash burn; licensing
upgrade_signal: contracted HALEU milestones and funding support advanced nuclear supply chain
downgrade_signal: regulatory/project delays; cash burn; AI linkage remains indirect

why_it_matters: 铀和核燃料供给链代表，但要防止只是 commodity beta
primary_sources_to_find: annual report; quarterly results; contract book; production guidance; uranium market disclosures
metrics_to_verify: contracted volumes; realized price; production; long-term contracts; fuel services exposure
upgrade_signal: long-term contract book and nuclear demand strengthen structural supply story
downgrade_signal: spot uranium commodity cycle dominates; AI/data center linkage too indirect

why_it_matters: 美国电力负荷增长和数据中心需求的电力零售/发电观察对象
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; investor presentation; generation/retail disclosures; data center/customer announcements
metrics_to_verify: generation mix; load growth; retail margins; data center exposure; FCF; debt
upgrade_signal: data center load improves contract/retail economics with visible cash flow
downgrade_signal: consumer/retail power risk dominates; AI linkage weak

why_it_matters: SMR/advanced nuclear 叙事代表，必须严查 licensing、cash runway 和客户协议
primary_sources_to_find: SEC filings; investor presentation; NRC/licensing updates; customer LOIs/contracts
metrics_to_verify: licensing milestones; project timeline; customer agreements; cash runway; capex needs
upgrade_signal: licensed project with credible customer/offtake and funded timeline
downgrade_signal: pre-revenue narrative, licensing delay, financing dilution, no near-term AI power relevance

why_it_matters: 上市 SMR 代表，适合验证 SMR 是否可在 AI infra 时间尺度内贡献供电
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; NRC/regulatory updates; project/customer disclosures; cash runway
metrics_to_verify: licensing status; project pipeline; customer commitments; cash burn; technology milestones
upgrade_signal: credible near-term project and customer economics emerge
downgrade_signal: project cancellations/delays, cash burn, weak customer commitments

why_it_matters: 核供应链和组件服务，比纯 SMR 叙事更接近实际订单
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; segment disclosures; backlog; nuclear services contracts
metrics_to_verify: nuclear operations backlog; commercial nuclear exposure; government mix; margin; capacity
upgrade_signal: commercial nuclear/SMR components show backlog growth tied to capacity additions
downgrade_signal: government/defense dominates; AI/data center linkage indirect

why_it_matters: 数据中心 onsite power 替代路线，需核验燃料成本和客户经济性
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; customer announcements; segment economics; backlog; fuel cost disclosures
metrics_to_verify: data center customer contracts; system margin; fuel assumptions; backlog; cash flow
upgrade_signal: data center contracts prove scalable economics and positive cash conversion
downgrade_signal: fuel cost, maintenance, financing or margin pressure weakens economics

why_it_matters: 储能是 firm power 辅助，不是核电；适合作为 grid stability 雷达
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; backlog; customer mix; project margin disclosures
metrics_to_verify: backlog; grid/data center exposure; gross margin; working capital; project execution
upgrade_signal: storage backlog tied to data center/grid constraints with margin improvement
downgrade_signal: project margin volatility; utility cycle dominates; AI linkage weak

why_it_matters: 输电和变电施工是 AI load 的物理约束之一
primary_sources_to_find: 10-K/10-Q; backlog; utility/customer disclosures; data center mentions
metrics_to_verify: backlog; electric power segment revenue; margin; customer mix; project duration
upgrade_signal: grid backlog and utility capex visibly accelerate from data center load
downgrade_signal: broad utility cycle dominates; labor/cost inflation erodes margin

why_it_matters: 核燃料主题 ETF，用作资金和持仓雷达，不是公司事实
primary_sources_to_find: official holdings; fund fact sheet; flows if available
metrics_to_verify: holdings; weights; AUM; flows; uranium exposure; regional concentration
upgrade_signal: helps identify uranium basket coverage and passive flows
downgrade_signal: ETF flow does not prove AI demand or company fundamentals

why_it_matters: 核能主题 ETF，用于找核电/核燃料覆盖公司
primary_sources_to_find: official holdings; fund fact sheet; flows if available
metrics_to_verify: holdings; weights; AUM; nuclear utility/fuel mix
upgrade_signal: helps identify nuclear/fuel companies and passive coverage
downgrade_signal: ETF inclusion is not fundamental evidence
